programme.desc: Executive Tiffany wants a living and office space. Jake revamps her dining room table using gold leaf. Jazz finds the perfect rustic desk. For mealtime, Jake makes Pork and Shrimp Pot Stickers and Vegetable Fried Rice. Jazz makes Mango Lemon Squares.

programme.title: Just Eats With Chef JJ
programme.desc: Chef JJ shows us some rice dishes that are great for the main meal and for dessert. On the menu is seafood paella with clams, mussels, shrimp and lobster. Then it's sticky rice topped with coconut cream & mango sauce.

programme.title: New Soul Kitchen Remix
programme.desc: "Chef Jernard brings Italy straight to your kitchen with a Penne pasta dish. It starts with Italian sausage, mixed with flavorful marinara sauce. But it's the four cheeses that tie this dish together: Ricotta, Provolone, Mozzarella, & Parmesan.".

programme.title: New Soul Kitchen Remix
programme.desc: Chef Jernard shows us how to get a meal on the table in no time at all. He makes a quick cavatappi pasta salad with roasted chicken and shrimp, spiced just right. It's hearty & satisfying.

programme.title: New Soul Kitchen
programme.desc: The Chef shows how dinner for two can be made right at home; he makes a Jamaican spiced rasta pasta with shrimp and scallops, then a wedge salad topped with candied bacon and garlic croutons; followed by a coconut mojito with toasted coconut.

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: Bren lays out a go to Cuban feast that her family loves. She gets started with a traditional Cuban rum and cola. Next it's a sofrito seasoned eggplant stew, then onto a pot of tender peppered oxtails.

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode it's not just a rice dish, Bren puts her spin on paella that's hearty and delicious. She makes a black rice seafood, mushroom paella and serves it along with a very fruity sangria.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: In her quest for a more relaxing and functional sanctuary, artist and photographer, Calethia decides to give her place some much needed TLC.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Glenda and Darryll are a husband and wife creative team expecting their first child; they just purchased a home and hope to create a modern, homey feel that includes their new plus one.

programme.title: All of Us
